description: A corporate travel manager calls to inquire about booking a block of 20 rooms for a conference.

nodes.task_description: Gather the requirements: dates, number of rooms, and any meeting space needs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary details for the group inquiry.

nodes.task_description: Check room and meeting space availability for the requested dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms availability for the room block and a small conference room.

nodes.task_description: Generate a proposal with a discounted group rate and send it to the travel manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and sends a professional proposal.
